_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-07 06:54:15Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./.claude/skills/bump-haklex.md`

```text
     1→---
     2→name: bump-haklex
     3→description: Use when upgrading @haklex/* packages across Shiroi, admin-vue3, and mx-core repos. Triggers on "bump haklex", "update haklex version", or "haklex 发布了 x.x.x 版本".
     4→---
     5→
     6→# Bump @haklex Packages
     7→
     8→Update `@haklex/*` dependencies across three repos, install, commit, and push.
     9→
    10→## Repos and Packages
    11→
    12→| Repo | Path | Packages |
    13→|------|------|----------|
    14→| Shiroi (web) | `apps/web/package.json` | rich-editor, rich-kit-shiro, rich-static-renderer |
    15→| admin-vue3 | `package.json` | rich-diff, rich-editor, rich-editor-ui, rich-kit-shiro, rich-plugin-toolbar, rich-style-token |
    16→| mx-core | `apps/core/package.json` | rich-headless |
    17→
    18→## Steps
    19→
    20→1. **Read version** from `haklex/rich-editor/package.json` 的 `version` 字段 — 此即最新版本
    21→2. **Grep** `@haklex/` in all three repos' `package.json` to confirm current versions
    22→3. **Edit** each `package.json` — bump all `@haklex/*` to latest version
    23→4. **pnpm install** in all three repos (parallel)
    24→5. **Commit & push** admin-vue3 and mx-core with message `chore(deps): bump @haklex packages to {version}`
    25→6. Shiroi 不自动 commit — 留给用户随其他改动一并提交
    26→
    27→## Repo Paths
    28→
    29→- Shiroi: `<REPO_ROOT>`
    30→- admin-vue3: `<GIT_DIR>/admin-vue3`
    31→- mx-core: `<GIT_DIR>/mx-core`
    32→
```
</details></tool-use>
